heading: Maximum amount charged for declassification reviews
label: 3350 Maximum amount charged for declassification reviews
notes: References in TextExecutive Order No. 13526, referred to in text, is Ex. Ord. No. 13526, , 75 F.R. 707, 1013, which is set out as a note under .Dec. 29, 2009section 3161 of this title
DefinitionsFor definition of “intelligence community” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of div. N of Pub. L. 115–31section 3003 of this title

children.text: may not charge the person reproduction fees in excess of the amount of fees that the head would charge the person for reproduction required in the course of processing a request for information under (commonly referred to as the “Freedom of Information Act”); andsection 552 of title 5
may waive or reduce any processing fees in the same manner as the head waives or reduces fees under such section 552.
